summary: Iteration 60: Tested Click-to-Call buttons on Ticket Queue page, Agent Performance Summary on Calls Dashboard, and /calls route access for call_support role. All 9 backend tests pass. All UI features verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 tested new features: 1) Click-to-Call buttons added to Ticket Queue, All Tickets, and Feedback Calls tabs in CallSupportDashboard.jsx - all working with green phone icons next to phone numbers. 2) Agent Performance Summary section added to Calls Dashboard showing metrics like Avg Quality, Satisfaction, Resolution rate, Red Flags, and Issues to Address for each agent. 3) /calls route now includes call_support role in allowedRoles. Backend endpoint GET /api/smartflo/agent-performance returns detailed agent metrics including miss_rate, avg_quality_score, satisfaction_rate, resolution_rate, red_flags_count, and issues array.

click_to_call_ticket_queue.details: Click-to-Call button (green phone icon) appears next to phone numbers in Ticket Queue tab. Found 1 button on queue with 1 ticket.

click_to_call_all_tickets.details: Click-to-Call buttons appear on All Tickets tab. Found 100 buttons for tickets with phone numbers.

click_to_call_feedback_calls.details: Click-to-Call buttons appear on Feedback Calls tab. Found 2 buttons for pending feedback calls.

agent_performance_summary.details: Agent Performance Summary (Last 30 Days) section visible on Calls Dashboard. Shows agent cards with metrics: Avg Quality, Satisfaction, Resolution, Red Flags, and Issues to Address.

agent_performance_metrics.details: Agent cards show: answered/missed counts, miss rate percentage, and specific issues like 'High miss rate: 100% of calls missed'

calls_route_access.details: /calls route accessible for admin. App.js line 536 includes call_support in allowedRoles.

backend_agent_performance_endpoint.details: GET /api/smartflo/agent-performance returns agent metrics with fields: agent_name, department, total_calls, answered, missed, miss_rate, avg_quality_score, satisfaction_rate, resolution_rate, red_flags_count, issues, status

ai_analysis_prompt_fields.note: AI analysis prompt was updated to be more direct/blunt. Expected fields in analysis response include: what_went_wrong, agent_tone_assessment, customer_tone_assessment, improvement_advice, red_flags, call_quality_score
ai_analysis_prompt_fields.verified_in_ui: AI column visible in Recent Calls table with brain icons for calls with recordings
